p3.title: Maintainability (scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs)
p3.description: Maintainability (scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs): the two large inline subphase-id iteration arrays (the requiredClosedSubphases seed loop near line 263 and the weighted-ledger existence loop near line 56362) now both enumerate the boundary-suite subphase spreads and overlap. As packs accrue, consider consolidating the per-suite subphase-id spreads into a single shared aggregate constant to reduce duplication and drift risk. Nonblocking, not specific to this pack's correctness.
p3.impact: Nonblocking maintainability finding; no effect on CP00-056 production_ready correctness.
p3.recommendation: Defer to a later validator consolidation pack so CP00-056 remains focused on the Risk A permission/audit guard boundary.
p3.defer_reason: Large validator aggregation cleanup is cross-pack maintainability work, not a CP00-056 correctness requirement.

boundary_checks.no_runtime_permission_evaluation: pass - runtime_permission_evaluation_permitted=false; forbidden runtime claim rejected; no evaluator call present
boundary_checks.plan_binding: pass - CP00-056 Risk A five-unit plan binding enforced

notes: Scope/goal conformance: CP00-056 closes RP00.P03.M05.S07-S11 as a single Risk-A pack (one boundary suite, one pack_id, five subphase_closeouts all -> CP00-056 production_ready), not per-unit closeouts. planned_risk_class=A, planned_unit_count=5, deviation_from_plan=false; included units == S07-S11 across contract definition, policy, module, fixture, and validation script checks.

Binding-only confirmed: pagination/filtering contract (S07), serialization guard (S08), unauthorized data omission (S09), API fixture (S10), and contract test (S11) are bound as metadata only; the *_decision fields resolve to '*_bound_metadata_only' and the *_bound/unauthorized_data_omitted flags are gated on metadata tenant equality.

No-write/no-runtime posture confirmed consistently across policy, module, assemble result, fixture, and contract no_write_scope: runtime_permission_evaluation/authz_evaluator/permission_engine/security_trimming/audit_ledger_append/audit_event_write/service_logic/runtime_route/database/storage/product_state/idempotency/lock all false; doesNotPersistApiFixture and doesNotExecuteRuntimeContractTest true; forbiddenBoundarySuiteClaims plus the any-truthy-claim rejection guard persist_api_fixture, execute_runtime_contract_test, evaluate_runtime_permission, call_authz_evaluator, run_permission_engine, apply_security_trimming, write_audit_event, append_audit_ledger, and writes.

Plan + upstream evidence references present and enforced: planRef docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json and CP00-055 evidence (manifest/command-evidence/claude-review-result/adjudication/construction-inspection) are required and cross-checked; next boundary RP00.P03.M06.S01; source micro-phase RP00.P03.M05 completed (source_micro_phase_completed=true), phase_completed=false.

Fail-closed path is metadata equality only (tenant_id == actor_tenant_id == resource_tenant_id == matter_tenant_id), not an AuthZ/permission-engine evaluation; the denied branch sets state 'blocked', all bound flags false, and emits blocked_claim_refs, validated by the assertResult allow/denied triplet so partial/mixed results cannot pass.

requested_pack_id=CP00-055 with correction_reason 'requested CP00-055 shifted to CP00-056 by live sequential cursor' and deviation_from_plan=false matches the established live-cursor correction pattern and is enforced in policy/definition/fixture/validator (correction_reason must include 'shifted to CP00-056').

Beneficial catch-up observation: the weighted-ledger existence loop near line 56362 previously omitted the CP00-054 (API Surface) and CP00-055 (API Permission Audit) subphase sets; this pack adds those plus the new guard set. Those subphases remain covered by the earlier requiredClosedSubphases loop, so this is additive coverage rather than a regression. Confirm the catch-up is intentional.

Validation context consistent with intent: node --check passes on all five touched JS files and node --test reports 622 passing; rp00:control-plane:validate is expected to FAIL only because docs/closeout-packs/cp00-056 evidence files do not exist yet (created at actual closeout, not in this metadata-binding pack). Fixture result key order matches assemble output, so the script's strict JSON.stringify equality check between fixture.result and the live-assembled result holds.
